sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Paul came out the same day to fix a burst pipe. Friendly, professional and very fairly priced. Would absolutely recommend.

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from start to finish. Sorted our boiler out quickly and explained everything clearly. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Rachel H
sample_reviews.text: Really impressed with the work done on our bathroom. Tidy, on time and great value. Highly recommend PD Smith Plumbing.

brand.usp: A trusted local Leeds plumber with years of hands-on experience, delivering honest pricing and quality workmanship every time. From emergency call-outs to full bathroom installations, PD Smith Plumbing Services has you covered.
brand.hero_headline: Your Trusted Leeds Plumber, Ready When You Need Us
brand.about_paragraph: I'm Paul Smith, a fully qualified and Gas Safe registered plumber based in Leeds with years of experience serving homeowners and businesses across West Yorkshire. I pride myself on turning up on time, keeping things tidy, and getting the job done right first time. Whether it's a dripping tap or a full central heating installation, you'll always get a fair price and honest advice from me.
